legal_model.notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Pakistan / پاكستان. Medical cannabis is illegal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.

notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Pakistan / پاكستان. Medical cannabis is illegal. Distribution is illegal. Prison exposure detected.
notes_raw: {{main|Cannabis in Pakistan}} Prohibited, but the smoking of hashish in [[Peshawar]] and the northern parts of Pakistan tends to be tolerated. One may be sent to jail for up to six months if found with [[charas]] in other parts of the country.<ref>{{citation |url = http://www.erowid.org/plants/cannabis/cannabis_law.shtml#pakistan |title = Cannabis legal status vault – Pakistan/Peshawar |publisher = Erowid.org |access-date = 5 June 2018 |archive-date = 15 December 2019 |archive-url = https://web.archive.org/web/20191215152836/https://www.erowid.org/plants/cannabis/cannabis_law.shtml#pakistan |url-status = live }}</ref> CBD legalized by cabinet announcement in September 2020.<ref name="ExpressTribune" />

facts.penalty: jail for up to six months if found with charas in other parts of the country.
